FirstName.description: The first name of the sales representative.

Id.description: The staff ID of the sales representative.

LastName.description: The last name of the sales representative.

SalesRepNumber.description: This value is the number that identifies the type of sales representative assigned to this client. One to six types of sales representatives can be assigned to a client at any given time, depending on site settings.

SalesRepNumbers.description: A list of the different types of sales representative functions assigned to this staff member.
